release_notes: V14.44 build 222 beta introduces streamed Web UI generation and heap protection. The dashboard is transmitted in small chunks instead of being assembled as one large Arduino String, reducing heap fragmentation and preventing the page from ending early around the WhatsApp section. The selected WhatsApp provider panel is server-rendered correctly, Cloud WhatsApp off is hidden when a provider is active, and heap, stream and FreeRTOS task diagnostics are added. All Build 221 parallel alarm, dedicated buzzer task and background WhatsApp queue functions, Build 220 unified glucose fonts, Nightscout, trend, sensor, IOB/COB, OTA and existing configuration functions are preserved.
